name: yaml-trees
description: Obsidian plugin to view, create and edit YAML files as interactive tables, forms or raw source.

scripts.test: esbuild tests/model.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=tests/model.test.cjs && esbuild tests/features.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=tests/features.test.cjs && esbuild tests/batch1.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=tests/batch1.test.cjs && esbuild tests/batch2.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=tests/batch2.test.cjs && esbuild tests/batch3.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=tests/batch3.test.cjs && esbuild tests/render.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:jsdom --alias:obsidian=./tests/obsidian-stub.ts --outfile=tests/render.test.cjs && node --test tests/model.test.cjs tests/features.test.cjs tests/batch1.test.cjs tests/batch2.test.cjs tests/batch3.test.cjs tests/render.test.cjs
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: ondreu
